meaning: vt.打断(正在说话或动作的人),中断,妨碍,插嘴vi.打断(别人的讲话或行动)n.(发给电脑的)中断信号
examples: Can I interrupt you just for a minute?
Please continue—I didn't mean to interrupt.
Once gone, only distant owl calls interrupt the sound of wind rushing through the treetops.
Children don't always understand why they can't interrupt Mommy when she's on the phone or computer.
